properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Can you feel it in the air Joy is everywhere, it's Christmas Everything is shining bright Oh what a glorious night, it's Christmas

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's the greatest time of the year It's the greatest time of the year

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come on let's celebrate, it's Christmas Be of good cheer, for Jesus is here Come on let's celebrate, it's Christmas So everybody sing And let the music ring, it's Christmas

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is a reason why We celebrate tonight It's Jesus The greatest gift of all He came to save us all He's Jesus It's Christmas

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come on let's celebrate Come on let's celebrate, it's Christmas Be of good cheer, for Jesus is here Come on let's celebrate, it's Christmas So everybody sing And let the music ring, it's Christmas

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's Christmas Gonna celebrate It's Christmas Let the music ring It's Christmas
